summary: Tested packaging + logistics tax changes (v62): Backend calculate_totals now computes taxable_value = goods + packaging + logistics with 5% GST. All 9 backend tests passed. Frontend pricing verified for both bulk and sample orders. Fixed a display bug where taxable value was showing incorrect amount.
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed: CheckoutPage.js line 1418 - Taxable value display was using logisticsCharge (logistics_only) instead of logistics (totalLogistics). Changed to use 'logistics' variable which contains the full logistics amount.
seed_data_creation: Backend tests created test orders with TEST_ prefix for verification, then cancelled them for cleanup.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Packaging + logistics tax changes fully tested. Key verifications: (1) calculate_totals() in orders_router.py correctly computes taxable_value = goods_subtotal + packaging + logistics, tax = 5% of taxable_value. (2) Order creation persists taxable_value and tax_on_charges_v2=True flag. (3) Invoice PDF rendering has v1/v2 branch - v2 orders show new layout (Goods Subtotal -> Packaging -> Logistics -> Taxable Value -> GST -> Total), v1 legacy orders show old layout (Subtotal -> GST -> Packaging -> Logistics -> Total). (4) Frontend CheckoutPage.js calculatePricing and calculateMultiItemPricing both compute tax on (goods + packaging + logistics). (5) Sample orders: flat ₹100 logistics, no packaging, tax on (goods + 100). (6) Bulk orders: packaging = qty × ₹1, totalLogistics = max(3% of goods, ₹3000), logistics_only = totalLogistics - packaging.

backend_calculate_totals.details: Bulk: items=1000×₹100, packaging=1000, logistics=2000 → subtotal=100000, taxable_value=103000, tax=5150, total=108150

backend_sample_order.details: Sample: qty=1, price=500, logistics=100 → subtotal=500, taxable_value=600, tax=30, total=630

order_field_persistence.details: taxable_value and tax_on_charges_v2 fields correctly persisted on order creation

v2_invoice_pdf.details: Paid v2 orders generate PDF with new layout showing Goods Subtotal, Packaging, Logistics, Taxable Value, GST, Total

legacy_invoice_pdf.details: Legacy orders (without tax_on_charges_v2) generate PDF with old layout preserving historical accuracy

frontend_bulk_pricing.details: Bulk order (1000m × ₹130): subtotal=130000, packaging=1000, logistics=2900, taxable=134900, tax=6745, total=141645

frontend_sample_pricing.details: Sample order (1m × ₹200): subtotal=200, logistics=100, taxable=300, tax=15, total=315
